content.problemStatement:
Chef is playing a noob version of the game Flappy Bird with the following rules:


The bird starts at a height HHH at x=0x = 0x=0.
There are NNN obstacles (numbered 111 through NNN). For each valid iii, the iii-th obstacle is at a position xix_ixi‚Äč and it has a height hih_ihi‚Äč.
For each integer iii (0‚Č§i<xN0 \le i \lt x_N0‚Č§i<xN‚Äč), Chef has the option to click once when the bird is at x=ix = ix=i. Let's denote the bird's height (yyy-coordinate) at that point by jjj. If he clicks, the bird moves to x=i+1x = i+1x=i+1 and y=j+1y = j+1y=j+1. Otherwise, the bird moves to x=i+1x = i+1x=i+1 and y=j‚ąí1y = j-1y=j‚ąí1.
There is no ceiling and all the obstacles extend upwards from the bottom and not the other way around.
For each valid iii, the bird crosses the iii-th obstacle successfully if the bird's height at x=xix = x_ix=xi‚Äč is strictly greater than hih_ihi‚Äč.
At any point before x=xNx = x_Nx=xN‚Äč, the bird's height should remain non-negative, otherwise it will drown.
If the bird crosses the NNN-th obstacle successfully, Chef wins the game.
Can you tell Chef if he can win the game (get the bird to cross all the obstacles) and the minimum number of clicks required to win in such a case?
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
`Explanation**Example case 2:** The figure below shows one possible way to successfully cross all the obstacles using the minimum number of clicks.
**Example case 3:** It is clear that even by clicking all the time, it is impossible to cross the last obstacle.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and HHH.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers x1,x2,‚Ä¶,xNx_1, x_2, \ldots, x_Nx1‚Äč,x2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,xN‚Äč.
The third line contains NNN space-separated integers h1,h2,‚Ä¶,hNh_1, h_2, \ldots, h_Nh1‚Äč,h2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,hN‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the minimum number of clicks required to cross all the obstacles successfully, or ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1 if it is impossible to cross all the obstacles.
